**Context**
Give us little insight on the current situation and what made you request this development.

**Goal**
What are you trying to achieve here

**Description**
Give as much details as possible. How do you want the application to behave, do you security or performance concerns, do you have clues about the implementation, etc.

**Acceptance criteria**
What checks should PR meet to satisfy your needs

- [ ] Criteria 1
